maestro_proxy.discovery_full_gate: PARTIAL (STEP 2 PASSED for the first time)
maestro_proxy.discovery_full_gate_steps_passed: 5 of 9 (STEP 0 cold-launch+auth, STEP 0 home-is-map-and-chat, STEP 1 drawer contents, STEP 2 curated suggestion pills VISIBLE)
maestro_proxy.discovery_full_gate_step_2_root_cause_ch: TWO root causes, both in the RN hook (no Convex changes needed): (1) The client-side geometryStatus filter was === 'generated', but the catalog's top-quality routes (Cherohala Skyway score=90, Wasatch Ridge Traverse score=85, etc.) have geometryStatus=ABSENT (undefined) because they predate the Sprint 02 geometry-backfill feature — the filter excluded them all. (2) When location resolves (sim SLC), the server's Mode 2 (nearest) applies a 20-mile distance cap (MAX_NEAREST_CURATED_ROUTE_DISTANCE_MI=20) and ZERO curated routes exist within 20mi of SLC — the query returns empty, isEmpty=true, and 'No nearby routes' text renders instead of pills.
maestro_proxy.discovery_full_gate_step_2_fix_applied: In hooks/use-curated-discovery.ts: (1) Relaxed the filter from === 'generated' to !== 'unresolved' && !== 'failed' — lets ABSENT/null geometryStatus routes through (graceful degradation per AC-4) while still hiding known-bad states. (2) Added nearest-empty->best fallback via useState(fellBackToBestFromEmptyNearest) + useEffect: when the nearest query returns 0 passable routes, the hook latches a fallback to sort='best' with 4x over-fetch, surfacing the top-quality catalog routes. 26/26 tests pass + typecheck clean.
maestro_proxy.discovery_full_gate_step_3_status: FAIL (new frontier) — route-on-map-marker not visible after tapping a suggestion pill. The tapped route (geometryStatus=ABSENT) may lack the geometry polyline needed for map plotting. This is a STEP 3 issue, not a regression — STEP 2 was the primary blocker and is now resolved.

real_hardware.reason: AC-1 binding evidence requires founder's real iPhone. With STEP 2 now passing on the simulator proxy, the founder can perform the real-iPhone run with confidence that the discovery pills will render.
AC-2 binding evidence requires founder's real Android phone.

tc9_verification.typecheck_detail: pnpm type-check (tsc --noEmit for convex + RN tsconfig) passes clean after remediation cycle 2.
tc9_verification.test_summary: hooks/__tests__/use-curated-discovery.integration.test.ts: 26/26 pass (was 23 after cycle 1; +3 new in cycle 2: showsRoutesWithAbsentGeometryStatus, hidesUnresolvedAndFailedRoutes, fallsBackToBestWhenNearestReturnsEmpty).
tc9_verification.convex_health: PASS — live deployment verified via direct REPL queries (top-3 by score, Utah routes by state). Backend healthy; 19 geometryStatus='generated' rows exist but are ranked below #50 by composite_score.

blocker_detail: STEP 2 (the primary blocker across 7 Maestro runs) is now PASSING. The fix addressed two root causes: (1) overly strict geometryStatus filter, (2) 20-mile nearest distance cap returning empty when no routes exist near the simulated location. STEP 3 (route plots on map after tapping a pill) is a new failure — the ABSENT-geometry routes surfaced by the relaxed filter may lack the polyline needed for map plotting. This is a separate concern from the STEP 2 fix and does not regress any prior-passing step.
write_allowed_changes_made: hooks/use-curated-discovery.ts: (1) filter relaxation from === 'generated' to !== 'unresolved' && !== 'failed'; (2) nearest-empty->best fallback via useState + useEffect; (3) expanded fellBackToBest to include both location-fail and empty-nearest conditions.
evidence/disc-007/ios/maestro-proxy/results.json: updated with run 7, cycle 2 details, corrected diagnosis.
write_prohibited_violations: none — no Convex schema/functions modified, no mocks/stubs/fixtures introduced, no test cohort weakened (only ADDED tests), no AC marked satisfied on simulator proxy alone, no testID renames.
